confirm.title: Do you want to close this dialog?
confirm.description: Your unsaved changes will be lost.

detail.relatedSubtitle: Explore more items from the same category.

close_confirm.title: Close this sheet?
close_confirm.description: Your changes (size, quantity) won’t be saved.

empty.title: Your order
empty.description: There are no items in your order yet.
empty.hint: Pick your favorite drinks and come back here to review your order before checkout.

toast.cart_cleared_success: All items removed from your order

order.title: Your order
order.subtitle: Review items, quantities, and total before checkout.
order.note_placeholder: Example: less ice, less sugar, add a straw...

confirm_clear.title: Clear your order?
confirm_clear.description: All items in your order will be removed and cannot be undone.

confirm_remove_item.title: Remove this item?
confirm_remove_item.description_with_name: {name} will be removed from your order.
confirm_remove_item.description: This item will be removed from your order.

success.title: Your order has been received
success.description: Thank you for your purchase. We will start preparing your drink shortly.
success.review_description: This is a read-only preview of your order.
success.empty_review: There is no order data to display.

initialized.title: Payment initialized
initialized.description: Your transaction has started. Please complete the payment steps.

pending.title: Payment pending
pending.description: We are still confirming this payment. Please check again shortly.

completed.title: Payment succeeded!
completed.description: Your transaction was completed successfully. Thank you for your purchase!

failed.title: Payment failed
failed.description: Your transaction could not be completed. Please try again.

canceled.title: Payment canceled
canceled.description: This payment was canceled. You can create a new order anytime.

expired.title: Payment expired
expired.description: This payment session has expired. Please place your order again.

notice.redirect_home: You will be redirected to the home page in <count>{seconds}s</count>
